feed.title: AO3 - Trans Tim Drake (DCU) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Trans Tim Drake (DCU) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: I'll Cover You
entry.summary:
Author: Lancelot15

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 23,602Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 49

Summary: Tim Drake is Transgender, and he was pretty sure he was completely and utterly alone in that.That is until his friend Kon-El comes out to him during a late night talk.Suddenly, the two find themselves looking out for each other and beginning to care about each other in different ways than before.(I suck at summaries)

entry.title: I see your sunshine
entry.summary:
Author: white_zane

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,635Chapters: 3/12Kudos: 15

Summary: Did you ever think about detransitioning simply because you knew that it would kill you faster than any bullet ever could?He never actually said any of that out loud. He didn’t write it down either, afraid to make all of it real, afraid that he wouldn’t be heard anyway even if he put all of it out of there. Because usually he was fine, you know?Tim had never been a girl, but he couldn’t quite be a man either, no matter how hard he tried, he couldn’t fit into anything.A girl to most, a boy only to those that bothered to listen to him for more than five seconds. Or: Tim has been out as a Transman for some years now, but he feels like he never really got anywhere in his transition. Meanwhile, Damian starts thinking about who he is if he's more than a trained weapon designed to kill people.

entry.title: Let's Hear it for the Roy
entry.summary:
Author: Flowerparrish Pods (Flowerparrish)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,569Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 18

Summary: Roy sits down on the tarmac, opens his mouth to take a bite of his sad craft services sandwich, and almost drops it in his lap when New Guy bounces off Natasha, takes immediate damage from her murder stare, and murder stares back. Oh no. He's perfect. Natasha is going to adopt him before Roy can marry him. Roy is going to have Natasha as a mother-in-law. The thought is absolutely terrifying. "Sandwich," Jason whispers in Roy's ear, jabbing an unreasonable elbow into his ribs. "Cut it out!" Roy hisses, conscious of the cameras. "You cut it out." Jason sits down aggressively close, snatching his sandwich and forcing Roy to scoot over or fall over. "Your mooning is getting between me and my lunch."   A lighthearted no capes T4T AU in a completely fictitious lightly Mythbusters-flavored setting.

entry.title: Soothing the Ache
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,377Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 90

Summary: Tim hisses, muscles tensing. Jason freezes, fingers still buried inside of him, and leans back. Tim's face is scrunched, lower lip caught between his teeth. "Did I hurt you?" "N-no," he says, letting out a deep breath. "Not exactly." His cheeks a dusted pink. His eyelids flutter. "I'm just a little… sore." "Sore." He nods. "Inside." Jason blinks. Then laughs. Tim joins him a second later, looking sheepish. Maybe they had overdone last night. Delicately, he pulls his fingers back out. Tim's face scrunches again, but he looks disappointed. "I'm fine, Jay. I still want to-" Jason rolls off of him, laying alongside him. "Maybe we should take it slow."_____Tim is sore. Jason gives him a massage.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: miss american dream
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,099Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 110

Summary: The biting, frigid winter wind hit Tim like a freight train as he sauntered down the dark, grimy streets of Park Row. His gut told him that a snowstorm was most likely headed their way, but with Gotham’s near-constant shitty weather, it was hard to tell most of the time. He had made the foolish decision of wearing a crop top and mini skirt, only covered by a cheap faux-fur coat one of the girls gave him as a hand-me-down. It barely did anything to combat the cold temperature, but at least he looked absolutely fuckable enough for any potential customers. The only problem was that the dark streets of Park Row were empty as Tim went through his usual nightly route.  Tim had come to accept that he would rot in this sleepless city that he called home, but he didn’t think it would be so soon.After waking up from a coma with no memories intact, Timothy tries to survive by selling his body in the dark and cruel streets of Gotham City.

entry.title: the aches in my chest are just growing pains.
entry.summary:
Author: maelstorms

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 24,304Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 351

Summary: “You can’t embarrass us like this, Timothy,” Mr. Drake quietly started to scold, before they were out of earshot. “I think we should talk to Bruce,” Jason said next to him, voice cold and eyes hard from where they were fixed on Tim’s back. “Yeah,” Dick said softly. “Yeah, I agree.”

entry.title: A swift correction
entry.summary:
Author: Timberlina_X

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,523Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 100

Summary: Bruce wanted to make it clear to Tim that he had no problems whatsoever with his personal escapades. Even when it would haunt him at night when he tried to sleep and all he could see behind his pressed closed lids was Tim. He was better than all this. He could contain himself like a proper man, like a father. That all came to a head when he overheard Hal fucking Jordan talk to his barely legal son after a league meeting.

entry.title: Tim's Guide to Teenage Parenting
entry.summary:
Author: Phoenix__edge7

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,868Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 46

Summary: Tim is in great grief so to fix his grief he obviously should try to clone his dead boyfriend right? I like the tim tries to clone kon and ends up with a baby too much so i wrote one because im in too deep baby. And btw theres a twist and my own OC who may be a little bit OP but shhh English IS my 1st langugue so its not that good. also ppl are reading my shit now so thats crazy. Please comment, lowk lets me know ppl are reading my shit and also motivates me to update more regularly.

entry.title: girlhood (in a box)
entry.summary:
Author: Wyvering

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,762Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 66

Summary: Tim’s a boy. He’s been a boy his whole life, even though being a boy makes his skin itch and his stomach turn and his heart ache. Tim is a boy, but maybe he doesn’t have to be. — Tim’s a girl, she just doesn’t know it yet.

entry.title: You Can’t Get It All off the Rack
entry.summary:
Author: thegetou

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,468Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 10

Summary: "Look, Paula is footing the bill. If you're smart, you'll take it as a chance to get a proper suit. Plus, she would really eat that up." Darry offered. "Lucky her, with daddy's allowance. God, Curtis, where else am I gonna wear a goddamn suit? If I have to get fancy shit, I'd rather have some khakis and a decent tennis shirt." Two-Bit chuckled. "Yeah, but then you're gonna look like a Soc." "Fuck off."__________ Darry, Two-Bit, Paula, and Tim do some clothes shopping, but something bigger is on Tim's mind.

entry.title: but you can't fool all the people all the time.
entry.summary:
Author: Prettything_uglylie

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,016Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 36

Summary: It’s too much information, in a way. His brain feels like it’s logged off in some way to perhaps protect himself or, maybe, all of the blood in his brain has gone straight to his dick. He stretches out an arm and Tim watches, curious and head tilting at the action, “You’re telling me… you’ve all been fucking and not told me?” AKA: Duke is finally ingrained into the open, polyamorous sexual dynamic of the Batfamily.

entry.title: Violet Birds in Emerald Skies
entry.summary:
Author: Niveara

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 81,440Chapters: 24/?Kudos: 892

Summary: Hal.exe stopped working. This child, this Sparrow, was THE Sparrow? Like the Champion of Predator, Wielder of Violet Light, Paragon of Love, Sparrow? The Star Sapphire with ‘rings for eyes’ that Kilowog, Green Lantern 1-9-8-6, was always going on and on about? The individual Carol, Star Sapphire 1-9-6-2, was always saying was a 'stain’ against the Zamaron’s Star Sapphires Corps?But they were just an itty bitty little baby.“You’re joking right” he teased assuming this was just Sinestro trying his hand at humor “please tell me your joking. Surely a 6 year old human child isn’t THE Sparrow”“You are correct” Sinestro agreed flatly a small smile forming upon his face as Hal relaxed at his response “a 6 year old human child is not THE Sparrow”“Oh thank-“ Hal started only to get cut off as Sinestro finished his thoughts.“It is my understanding that the child is only 4 and a half”ORTim Drake becomes a Star Sapphire shortly after watching the Flying Graysons fall. This has consequences.

entry.title: Young Justice Can Have a Little Evil As a Treat
entry.summary:
Author: Brownies96

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 70,015Chapters: 28/35Kudos: 1,443

Summary: Tim snorts, “Right. Obviously, that’s not the full story, but you were in space so we’re good.” He activates the tablet and shows Hal familiar paperwork. “I’ve come to the conclusion that if the League is going to treat me like I’m an unstable rogue, they’re going to have to commit to the bit.”After being treated like unwanted children all their lives, Tim, Kon, Cassie, and Bart start to realise that the adulthood set out before them isn't much better than the past their leaving behind. They decide it's time to make their own way in the world, even if it means being labelled as 'evil'

entry.title: Tears
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 836Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 95

Summary: Tim dreams of a heavy press over his body. Of heat and swirling dregs of pleasure between his legs. He floats in an empty void of it, carried on an invisible current. On the edges of his awareness, he can almost hear a voice, soft and soothing. Hot breath fanning in his face. Phantom hands touching his skin. Then the pleasure turns sharp. The weight bears too heavily on him. The soft voice falters into low groans. Something in the empty void sours. Tim feels his body squirm away, but he can’t move. He can’t breathe. Trapped. His eyes flash open with a gasp. The world processes slowly as the dregs of his dream slough out of his mind. The weight and the heat still press at him, press him into the mattress. He wrenches beneath the bulk of a shadow, an indignant sound escaping his lips. Still trapped. “Fuck,” a voice hisses. Breath hot in Tim’s face. “Fuck, no. Go back to sleep._____Tim should have stayed asleep.

entry.title: smoke on the horizon coming through in waves
entry.summary:
Author: Phantomxlegend

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,460Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 166

Summary: “Long week,” Tim admitted, stretching his arms above his head languidly like a cat, a little bit of his shirt riding up to expose the soft white skin of his belly.“Long enough to get high on a Wednesday?” Kon asked, eyes glancing over at the vape pen resting on the bedside table. He couldn’t stop himself from laughing. “Couldn’t even wait until Friday?”“No time on Fridays,” Tim shook his head slowly and then reached out to fumble with the pen on the table next to him, “That’s when all the criminals are out… s’ like they got day jobs or something.”--Tim gets high and he and Kon have sex
